name: DEVIL DINOSAUR
description: Don't let his name scare you — Devil Dinosaur is actually a gentle giant. But with razor-sharp fangs, a mighty sweeping tail, a thunderous roar, and a force-field shield gifted by his human partner Moon Girl, it's no wonder why heroes and villains alike are intimidated by this prehistoric powerhouse!
lore: Ripped across dimensions from a prehistoric world, Devil Dinosaur found a best friend in the young genius Moon Girl. This dino-riffic duo keeps Manhattan's Lower East Side safe with the perfect balance of brains and brawn. When the Timestream Entanglement hit, Devil was sucked into a temporal anomaly and ended up on display in the Collector's Gallery. Devil eventually escaped and found sanctuary in Deadpool's Monster Kingdom on Staten Island. Upon receiving Moon Girl's distress signal from inside the time-tossed Alchemax HQ, Devil stomped into action to save his BFF.

abilities.name: Primal Bite
abilities.description: Bite forward. Applies a Bleed that deals continuous Percentage Damage

abilities.name: Impact Beam
abilities.description: Unleash a devastating beam of energy that inflicts a Bleed and Slow.

abilities.name: Buddy Barrier
abilities.description: Activate the heart-shaped generator to expand a spherical shield that blocks incoming damage. Enemies caught within are Slowed

abilities.name: Savage Predation
abilities.description: Dash and pounce on your prey with a vicious bite, applying a Bleed. If the target is already Bleeding, clamp down before hurling them away

abilities.name: Frenzied Feast
abilities.description: Unleash a flurry of continuous bites, converting the damage dealt into Bonus Health. Deals extra damage against Bleeding targets

stats.Bonus Damage: First 4 hits: 5% Maximum Health each; 5th hit: 10% Maximum Health

abilities.name: Prehistoric Plating
abilities.description: Take reduced damage from headshots. Immune to launch-up, knock-back, and other displacement effects. Enemies and allies generate less Ultimate Ability Energy when damaging or healing him

abilities.name: Apex Advantage
abilities.description: Gain Bonus Health when you inflict Bleeding upon an enemy

abilities.name: Devil-Beast Rampage
abilities.description: Erupt in primal fury! Gain a massive Movement Speed Boost while unleashing earth-shattering stomps that Launch enemies and applies a Bleed. Thunderous roars also emit sonic waves that Slow enemies hit

received.name: Prehistoric Partner
received.description: The Punisher rides atop Devil Dinosaur, restricting him to only Adjudication/Deliverance and Scourge Grenade while disabling other abilities. While mounted, Devil Dinosaur absorbs a portion of all damage inflicted on The Punisher

base.description: Adds a new ability. Upon activation, Primal Bite is replaced. Devil Dinosaur gains 2 magnetic cannons that can be fired forward; the cannonballs detonate when hitting enemies or the environment.

stats.Special Effect: The explosion applies a Bleed effect to targets

enhanced.description: When teaming up with The Punisher, the duo can request an interaction. Once accepted, The Punisher rides atop Devil Dinosaur, restricting him to only Adjudication/Deliverance and Scourge Grenade while disabling other abilities. While mounted, The Punisher gains Damage Reduction; Devil Dinosaur absorbs a portion of all damage inflicted on The Punisher.

base.description: Impact Beam is replaced by a frontal water spray. This stream damages enemies while providing healing to teammates.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Jeff the Land Shark, Jeff can ride atop Devil Dinosaur's head. While riding, both gain some Damage Reduction and are swirled in therapeutic waters, receiving Continuous Healing. Jeff can only cast Joyful Splash, Aqua Burst, and Healing Bubble during this time.
